name: Low Fat Prune-Honey Quickbread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups (12 ounces box) pitted prunes, cut up.
An oiled and floured glass loaf pan.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine Scramblers egg substitute with vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, mix prunes, boiling water, baking soda, and honey. Let sit for 20 minutes.
4. Add the honey mixture to the egg substitute mixture.
5. Sift flour and sugar together, then stir into the prune mixture along with the walnuts until just mixed.
6. Pour batter into loaf pan.
7. Bake for 40-60 minutes or until a clean knife inserted in the center comes out
